title: thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. hirtirachis
intro: Thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. hirtirachis, a lesser-known species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to certain regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
